# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: gcp-app-stack
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: gcp-app-stack
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: gcp-app-stack
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: gcr.io/your-project-id/gcp-app-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: gcp-app-service
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: gcp-app-stack

apiVersion: sqladmin.googleapis.com/v1beta4
kind: SqlDatabaseInstance
metadata:
  name: gcp-sql-instance
spec:
  settings:
    tier: db-n1-standard-1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
  region: us-central1
  storageAutoResize: true

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: gcp-storage-pvc
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 20Gi

apiVersion: storage.googleapis.com/v1beta1
kind: StorageClass
metadata:
  name: fast
provisioner: kubernetes.io/gce-pd
parameters:
  type: pd-ssd
